WWF No Mercy: Recompiled (beta)
========================================

A native PC port of WWF No Mercy (N64), produced by static
recompilation. This download contains NO game assets — you must own the game
and supply your own ROM of the USA Rev 1 release.

Getting started
---------------
1. Unzip this folder anywhere and run NoMercyRecompiled.exe.
2. Click "Load ROM" and select your WWF No Mercy (USA, Rev 1) ROM
   (SHA1 91CEE3D096F4A76644D8B35B9AEAD6448909ABD1). The launcher validates
   and remembers it. The original release (Rev 0) is not accepted.
3. Click "Start Game".

Notes
-----
- Windows may show a SmartScreen warning because the exe is unsigned:
  "More info" -> "Run anyway".
- Saves and settings live in %LOCALAPPDATA%\NoMercyRecompiled\. The cart's
  flash save (progress, unlocks, created wrestlers) persists automatically.
  To make the install portable instead, create an empty file named
  portable.txt next to the exe.
- A log file (NoMercyRecompiled.log) is written to the same folder — include
  it when reporting bugs.
- F11 or Alt+Enter toggles fullscreen.

Project page, source code, and issue tracker:
https://github.com/jessetbh/WWFNoMercyRecomp

License: GNU GPLv3 (see COPYING). This project is not affiliated with or
endorsed by Nintendo, THQ, WWE, or AKI.
